focalElement: isolated faceted pink rose-quartz crystal with Princess Aurelia slumbering inside
secondaryElement: transparent PNG background — no frame, no arch; the crystal IS the cell
notes: PrincessCrystalCell interior (120w × 120h) — pink rose-quartz crystal with Aurelia's silhouette, isolated on transparent alpha
No cathedral arch / stone frame in the raster — the cell's surrounding UI chrome is the only frame
Princess rendered with blonde hair + white gown + gold tiara, visible through the translucent pink facets
Same raster renders for both charged and freed states; freed applies a brighter rose-halo CSS filter and the banner-swap signals state
